MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted; Declaration Of Ashley Mulhorn, Esq.; Notice Of Lodging Of Proposed Order; Proposed Order
Off Calendar May-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq, COLLECTION AT LAW, INC. A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION (818) 716-7630
Attorneys for Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.,
Mazin E. Shatara, 415-244-9737, Pro Per Defendant

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF

Matter was not properly contested by Defendant Mazin Shatara. Court allows brief argument.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted.

The unopposed motion is granted. The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission are deemed admitted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 by email to Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen at tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
